about.story: Hook Marketing was founded in 2020 by Hamza with one conviction: marketing agencies were over-charging and under-delivering. Five years and 150+ clients later, we've built one of Jordan's most results-focused digital growth studios — serving brands from Amman to Riyadh, Dubai to New York.
about.mission: Our mission is simple: make every dollar your brand spends on marketing work harder than the one before it.

items.title: EVIDENCE FIRST
items.desc: Every decision is backed by data. We don't guess — we test, measure, and iterate.

items.title: SPEED MATTERS
items.desc: The market doesn't wait. Neither do we. Fast execution with zero compromise on quality.

items.desc: Clear communication, honest reporting, and no vanity metrics. You know exactly where you stand.

items.title: YOUR GROWTH IS OURS
items.desc: We succeed when you succeed. That's why 98% of our clients stay after year one.
